digest.title: LLM Daily Report
digest.llmGenerating: LLM is generating the report, usually takes 30–60 seconds…
digest.noReport: No report yet, click to regenerate

freshInput.tooltip: Input tokens not served from cache — the model had to process them fresh. Drives compute cost and latency.

cacheRead.tooltip: Input tokens served from the prompt cache. Higher cache read = lower cost and lower latency.

cacheWrite.tooltip: Tokens written to the prompt cache for future reuse. A separate billing item — not input, not output.

output.tooltip: Tokens generated by the model. The primary driver of latency tail and output cost.

contextUsed.tooltip: Tokens placed in the model's context window. Not the same as billed input tokens.

contextDelta.tooltip: Change in context size vs. the previous call. Spot which step inflated the window.

peakContext.tooltip: Largest context window size observed in this session or turn.

cacheRatio.label: Cache Ratio
cacheRatio.tooltip: cache_read / (fresh_input + cache_read + cache_write). Higher = better cache efficiency.

proxyTraffic.title: Proxy Traffic
proxyTraffic.bodyFileDeleted: Original log file has been deleted
proxyTraffic.bodyParseErrorHint: (failed to parse the proxy log line — possibly truncated, offset stale after rotation, or partial gzip read)
proxyTraffic.sseWarningTip: SSE response has no parsed events; possibly closed early or non-standard format

proxy.intro: Proxy v2 — minimal controller. Start = inject settings + spawn; Stop = restore settings + kill. Dashboard exits auto-stop.
proxy.title: Proxy v2
proxy.subtitle: controller-managed

charts.xAxisTimeHint: X axis = cumulative active time (user idle excluded)

sessionDetail.noTurns: No conversation data for this day

rawTab.noProxyBody: This call has no matching proxy request body. Attribution / Diff views rely on the local proxy capturing requests as they happen.
rawTab.noProxyGuide: Install and enable the proxy from the «{{tab}}» tab. Calls made afterwards will carry full request bodies.
rawTab.noProxyCaveat: Existing calls can't be backfilled — the proxy only records traffic while it's running.
rawTab.noProxyBodyStopped: Once you start the local proxy, future calls will be recorded with full request / response bodies.
rawTab.noProxyRestartHint: After the proxy starts, you must restart Claude Code so new calls go through the proxy. Existing calls can't be backfilled.
rawTab.noProxyTitleRunning: No proxy data for this call
rawTab.noProxyBodyRunning: The proxy is running, but this call has no matching request body. Common causes: (a) the call happened before the proxy started, or (b) Claude Code was not restarted after enabling the proxy, so the request still went through the original path.
rawTab.noProxyManageHint: For more settings and traffic browsing, go to the «{{tab}}» tab.

diff.noChanges: ✓ No changes vs previous call · all sections identical
diff.charsTooltip: Net character delta (cur − prev). Counts text characters only — not LLM tokens. Tokenizer behavior varies by content (CJK / code / JSON), so refer to the Context metric in the header for actual token usage.

terms.ledgerInterpretation: New input this round: {{freshIn}} ({{cacheWrite}} written to cache for reuse) · loaded from cache: {{cacheRead}} · model output: {{output}}{{ratio}}

ledgerExplainer.title: Token Ledger · How it's computed
ledgerExplainer.emptyInput: No input this round — all three input buckets are 0; Cache Ratio is undefined.
ledgerExplainer.footer: The four buckets above never overlap and map to Anthropic's real billing tiers: cache_read ≈ 0.1× discount · cache_write ≈ 1.25× premium · fresh_in ≈ 1.0× baseline · output billed independently.
ledgerExplainer.footerAggSuffix: In aggregate view, each bucket sums across the session/turn scope.

rows.cacheReadCall: Replay from history: read back from a previous call's cache, no re-inference needed
rows.cacheReadAgg: Cumulative cache reuse: read back from past calls' cache hits
rows.cacheWriteCall: Written to cache this round: first-time content marked with a cache breakpoint for future reuse
rows.cacheWriteAgg: Cumulative cache writes: this-round content marked with a cache breakpoint
rows.freshInCall: Uncached this round: first-time content with no cache breakpoint
rows.freshInAgg: Cumulative uncached input: this-round content without a cache breakpoint
rows.outputCall: Tokens the LLM generated in this call
